message:
refactor(tools): extract IMAGE_MAX_BYTES constant for image size limit

Promote the inline 4.5MB image size limit from a local constant in
resize_image_if_needed() to a module-level pub const IMAGE_MAX_BYTES,
making it accessible to other modules that need to check image sizes
before sending to the API. All four size comparisons within the resize
function now reference the shared constant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
